features.name: signed remainder with sign-extended operands
features.description: Code should include a signed remainder operation where the dividend is sign-extended from a smaller bit width

features.name: mux with tail-of-unsigned-conversion condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition is derived from tail() applied to an unsigned conversion of a signed value

features.name: unsigned conversion of signed value with tail bit reduction
features.description: Code should include a conversion from signed to unsigned followed by dropping high-order bits using tail
